_comment: 破壁 / GlobalInfo — 论文 author SUBSCRIPTIONS. The builder (scripts/lib/arxiv.mjs) queries arXiv for each author's most recent papers (au:"Name"), so new work auto-appears in the 论文 channel — subscribe to a person, not a single paper. `name` is the exact arXiv author string; `website`/`github` are shown in 来源管理. Removing an author here (or 暂停 in 来源管理) stops/hides their auto-fetched papers. The curated reading-club list in papers.json is separate and stays. Add authors freely.

authors.name: Danijar Hafner
authors.displayName: Danijar Hafner · 世界模型 / Dreamer

authors.name: Sergey Levine
authors.displayName: Sergey Levine · 机器人学习（UC Berkeley）
